metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4508
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Rabbit Anti-PGRN antibody (Invitrogen) labels puncta colocalizing with the postsynaptic marker PSD-95 and the presynaptic marker VGLUT-1 in hippocampal primary cultures at DIV 14 indicating the presence of Progranulin at excitatory glutamatergic synapses. As GFP-tagged Progranulin is shown to be transported in axons and dendrites (Fig. 2) its presence in pre-and postsynaptic compartments can be assumed.

18/01/2021 Dnyanada: The anti-PGRN antibody shows a similar pattern of expression as GFP-PGRN indicating that the antibody might be specific for endogenous PGRN (also shown in S1).
The paper shows colocalization with both pre and postsynaptic markers: vGlut1 and PSD95 (arrowheads), however, due to insufficient resolution of the images, the term "synapse" was used.. Experimental description: Primary hippocampal cultures were prepared from embryonic day 18 (E18)
Sprague Dawley rats as previously described (p. 5419)
